examples.sentence: 彼が来るとともに、パーティーが始まりました。
examples.translation: The party started as soon as he arrived.
examples.translationEn: The party started as soon as he arrived
examples.romaji: Kare ga kuru to tomoni, paatii ga hajimarimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The party started as soon as he arrived

examples.sentence: 季節が変わるとともに、服のファッションも変わります。
examples.translation: As the seasons change, clothing fashion also changes.
examples.translationEn: As the seasons change, clothing fashion also changes
examples.romaji: Kisetsu ga kawaru to tomoni, fuku no fasshon mo kawarimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As the seasons change, clothing fashion also changes

examples.sentence: 成長とともに、いろいろな経験を積むことが大切です。
examples.translation: As you grow, it is important to gain various experiences.
examples.translationEn: As you grow, it is important to gain various experiences
examples.romaji: Seichou to tomoni, iroirona keiken wo tsumu koto ga taisetsu desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As you grow, it is important to gain various experiences

examples.sentence: 技術の進歩とともに、便利なアプリが増えています。
examples.translation: With the advancement of technology, the number of convenient apps is increasing.
examples.translationEn: With the advancement of technology, the number of convenient apps is increasing
examples.romaji: Gijutsu no shinpo to tomoni, benrina apuri ga fueteimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: With the advancement of technology, the number of convenient apps is increasing

examples.sentence: いつも勉強しているとは限らない。
examples.translation: It's not always true that I'm studying.
examples.translationEn: Its not always true that Im studying
examples.romaji: Itsumo benkyou shite iru to wa kagiranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not always true that Im studying

examples.sentence: 高い商品がいいとは限らない。
examples.translation: Expensive products are not necessarily good.
examples.translationEn: Expensive products are not necessarily good
examples.romaji: Takai shouhin ga ii to wa kagiranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Expensive products are not necessarily good

examples.sentence: 彼が正しいとは限らない。
examples.translation: It's not necessarily true that he is right.
examples.translationEn: Its not necessarily true that he is right
examples.romaji: Kare ga tadashii to wa kagiranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not necessarily true that he is right

examples.sentence: 雨が降るとは限らない。
examples.translation: It's not necessarily going to rain.
examples.translationEn: Its not necessarily going to rain
examples.romaji: Ame ga furu to wa kagiranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not necessarily going to rain

examples.sentence: 彼が来ないことはない。
examples.translation: It's not that he won't come (it's possible that he will come).
examples.translationEn: Its not that he wont come (its possible that he will come)
examples.romaji: Kare ga konai koto wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that he wont come (its possible that he will come)

examples.sentence: あの問題が解けないことはない。
examples.translation: It's not impossible to solve that problem (it can be solved).
examples.translationEn: Its not impossible to solve that problem (it can be solved)
examples.romaji: Ano mondai ga tokenai koto wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not impossible to solve that problem (it can be solved)

examples.sentence: その仕事が難しくないことはない。
examples.translation: That job is not without difficulty (it has some difficulties).
examples.translationEn: That job is not without difficulty (it has some difficulties)
examples.romaji: Sono shigoto ga muzukashikunai koto wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: That job is not without difficulty (it has some difficulties)

examples.sentence: 彼女が正しくないことはない。
examples.translation: It's not impossible that she is right (she could be right).
examples.translationEn: Its not impossible that she is right (she could be right)
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga tadashikunai koto wa nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not impossible that she is right (she could be right)

examples.sentence: この問題は解けないこともないけど、難しいです。
examples.translation: It's not that I can't solve this problem, but it's difficult.
examples.translationEn: Its not that I cant solve this problem, but its difficult
examples.romaji: Kono mondai wa tokenai koto mo nai kedo, muzukashii desu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that I cant solve this problem, but its difficult

examples.sentence: 彼に会わないこともないが、あまり話す時間がない。
examples.translation: It's not that I can't meet him, but there's not much time to talk.
examples.translationEn: Its not that I cant meet him, but theres not much time to talk
examples.romaji: Kare ni awanai koto mo nai ga, amari hanasu jikan ga nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Its not that I cant meet him, but theres not much time to talk

examples.sentence: お金がないこともないけれど、節約した方がいい。
examples.translation: It's not that I don't have money, but it's better to save.
examples.translationEn: Its not that I dont have money, but its better to save

examples.sentence: このゲームが面白くないこともないが、他のゲームの方が楽しい。
examples.translation: It's not that this game isn't interesting, but other games are more fun.
examples.translationEn: Its not that this game isnt interesting, but other games are more fun
examples.romaji: Kono geemu ga omoshirokunai koto mo nai ga, hoka no geemu no hou ga tanoshii.

examples.sentence: この映画はとても感動的で、泣かないではいられなかった。
examples.translation: This movie was so touching, I couldn't help but cry.
examples.translationEn: This movie was so touching, I couldnt help but cry

examples.translation: When I see her smile, I can't help but laugh.

examples.sentence: 彼の話はつまらないが、聞かないではいられない。
